notes: Feature v4: request-calibrated scale-free features, pool-anchored regularity block, denoised sizing-lattice / streets-reach / position / conditional-determinism blocks (all verified non-degenerate on live traffic), live-degeneracy feature mask (LIVE_DEGENERATE_FEATURES in features.py), live-regime domain randomization at train time (research/live_mimic.py), deterministic sub-chunk TTA at serve time, 12-model HistGB ensemble + logistic blend. Numpy-native inference (model_v2.npz).
private_data_attestation: This miner does not train on validator-only evaluation data. Feature selection excludes columns whose variance collapses on live traffic, and the domain-randomization targets are aggregate marginal statistics, both measured on unlabeled captured payloads only (no labels exist in captures; no label information can leak).
training_data_statement: Trained exclusively on the public Poker44 training benchmark (api.poker44.net/api/v1/benchmark), all release dates, projected through the validator payload canonicalizer. Each group additionally trains in a live-regime augmentation view (research/live_mimic.py): an order-preserving bucket remap of the same benchmark hands whose target marginals are aggregate, unlabeled statistics of captured evaluation payloads (as with the live-degeneracy feature mask). No evaluation payload or label enters training data.

verification.implementation_sha256_recipe: sha256 over files sorted by repo-relative POSIX path, updating for each file: utf-8 bytes of the relative path, then the raw file bytes. Files: neurons/miner.py, poker44/detection/features.py, poker44/detection/model.py
verification.repo_commit_note: repo_commit reported in-band equals `git rev-parse HEAD` of the serving checkout of this repository.
